infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Movido needs your location to track deliveries and provide real-time updates to dispatch.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Movido needs background location to keep tracking active during deliveries.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Movido needs camera access to capture proof of delivery photos and truck inspection evidence.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Movido needs photo library access to upload delivery proof images.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Movido needs your location for delivery tracking.

plugins.cameraPermission: Movido needs camera for POD photos.

plugins.photosPermission: Movido needs photos for delivery proof.
